name: One-Time Pad (OTP)
description: Demonstrates the One-Time Pad cipher: XOR each plaintext byte with a corresponding random key byte to produce ciphertext, then XOR with the same key to decrypt — the only provably unbreakable cipher.
intuition: XOR is its own inverse: A⊕K=C and C⊕K=A. Because the key is truly random and never reused, the ciphertext reveals zero information about the plaintext — every possible message is equally likely.
